name: Spirit Totem
description: Starting at 2nd level, you can call forth nature spirits to influence the world around you. As a bonus action, you can magically summon an incorporeal spirit to a point you can see within 60 feet. The spirit creates an aura in a 30‑foot radius around that point. It counts as neither a creature nor an object, though it has the spectral appearance of the creature it represents. As a bonus action, you can move the spirit up to 60 feet to a point you can see. The spirit persists for 1 minute or until you are incapacitated. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest. The effect of the spirit's aura depends on the type of spirit you summon: Bear Spirit, Hawk Spirit, or Unicorn Spirit.

mechanics.name: Summon Spirit
mechanics.description: Summon an incorporeal spirit to a point you can see within 60 feet, creating a 30‑foot radius aura.

mechanics.name: Move Spirit
mechanics.description: Move the spirit up to 60 feet to a point you can see.

effects.target: creature of your choice in the aura when the spirit appears
you and your allies in the aura

effects.trigger: when a creature makes an attack roll against a target in the aura
effects.result: grant advantage to that attack roll

effects.target: you and your allies in the aura
you and your allies in the aura

effects.trigger: when you cast a spell using a spell slot that restores hit points
effects.target: creature of your choice in the aura
